verse.verse_1: Yusabbiḥu lillāhi mā fis-samāwāti wa mā fil-arḍ(i), lahul-mulku wa lahul-ḥamdu wa huwa ‘alā kulli syai'in qadīr(un).
verse.verse_2: Huwal-lażī khalaqakum fa minkum kāfiruw wa minkum mu'min(un), wallāhu bimā ta‘malūna baṣīr(un).
verse.verse_3: Khalaqas-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqqi wa ṣawwarakum fa'aḥsana ṣuwarakum, wa ilaihil-maṣīr(u).
verse.verse_4: Ya‘lamu mā fis-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa ya‘lamu mā tusirrūna wa mā tu‘linūn(a), wallāhu ‘alīmum biżātiṣ-ṣudūr(i).
verse.verse_5: Alam ya'tikum naba'ul-lażīna kafarū min qabl(u), fa żāqū wabāla amrihim wa lahum ‘ażābun alīm(un).
verse.verse_6: Żālika bi'annahū kānat ta'tīhim rusuluhum bil-bayyināti fa qālū abasyaruy yahdūnanā, fa kafarū wa tawallau wastagnallāh(u), wallāhu ganiyyun ḥamīd(un).
verse.verse_7: Za‘amal-lażīna kafarū allay yub‘aṡū, qul balā wa rabbī latub‘aṡunna ṡumma latunabba'unna bimā ‘amiltum, wa żālika ‘alallāhi yasīr(un).
verse.verse_8: Fa āminū billāhi wa rasūlihī wan-nūril-lażī anzalnā, wallāhu bimā ta‘malūna khabīr(un).
verse.verse_9: Yauma yajma‘ukum liyaumil-jam‘i żālika yaumut-tagābun(i), wa may yu'mim billāhi wa ya‘mal ṣāliḥay yukaffir ‘anhu sayyi'ātihī wa yudkhilhu jannātin tajrī min taḥtihal-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadā(n), żālikal-fauzul-‘aẓīm(u).
verse.verse_10: Wal-lażīna kafarū wa każżabū bi'āyātinā ulā'ika aṣḥābun-nāri khālidīna fīhā, wa bi'sal-maṣīr(u).
verse.verse_11: Mā aṣāba mim muṣībatin illā bi'iżnillāh(i), wa may yu'mim billāhi yahdi qalbah(ū), wallāhu bikulli syai'in ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_12: Wa aṭī‘ullāha wa aṭī‘ur-rasūl(a), fa'in tawallaitum fa innamā ‘alā rasūlinal-balāgul-mubīn(u).
verse.verse_13: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huw(a), wa ‘alallāhi falyatawakkalil-mu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_14: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū inna min azwājikum wa aulādikum ‘aduwwal lakum faḥżarūhum, wa in ta‘fū wa taṣfaḥū wa tagfirū fa innallāha gafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_15: Innamā amwālukum wa aulādukum fitnah(tun), wallāhu ‘indahū ajrun ‘aẓīm(un).
verse.verse_16: Fattaqullāha mastaṭa‘tum wasma‘ū wa aṭī‘ū wa anfiqū khairal li'anfusikum, wa may yūqa syuḥḥa nafsihī fa ulā'ika humul-mufliḥūn(a).
verse.verse_17: In tuqriḍullāha qarḍan ḥasanay yuḍā‘ifhu lakum wa yagfir lakum, wallāhu syakūrun ḥalīm(un).
